name: WW Carrot Muffins (No Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients until combined.
3. Spray a muffin tin with Pam cooking spray.
4. Divide the batter equally among the muffin cups.
5. Bake for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Makes 12 muffins, which is equivalent to two servings of six (6) muffins each.
- Each serving counts as: 1 Bread, 1 Fruit, 1 Milk, 1 Protein, and 3/4 Vegetable.
7. This no-fat recipe can be customized by using Egg Beaters instead of eggs and Equal instead of Sweet and Low. It freezes well.
